governance.board_oversight: Climate is on the Audit & Risk Committee agenda quarterly; charter updated 2023 to add climate explicitly
governance.management_role: Chief Sustainability Officer reports to CEO; climate KPIs in CFO + COO compensation

strategy.transition_plan: 1.5C-aligned transition plan published Sept 2025; covers Scope 1+2 -42% by 2030, Scope 3 -25% by 2030
strategy.scenario_analysis: Performed against IPCC SR1.5 1.5C scenario AND NGFS Disorderly 2C scenario; financial impact materiality assessed
strategy.transition_vs_physical: Risks separated; physical = water stress in 3 sites, chronic heat in 2 sites; transition = EU carbon border, US tariff

ghg_inventory.scope_3_methodology: GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain Standard; emission factors from DEFRA 2024, EPA, IEA
ghg_inventory.third_party_assurance: Reasonable assurance per ISAE 3410 by Big-4 auditor; opinion attached as Schedule G

targets.sbti_validation: Validated by SBTi May 2024; near-term 2030 target + net-zero by 2050
targets.near_term: Scope 1+2: -42% by 2030 vs 2020 base year; Scope 3: -25% (categories 1+11)
targets.net_zero: By 2050 with residual ≤10% removal/offset per SBTi corporate net-zero standard
